reviews.review_title: This is a very good game
reviews.review_description: I love the game soon much I am playing it all day and they have nice mods ingame and I love the mod menu it's very high ￼ quality and I like to run about the forist so keep the good work up project lemon🙏

It has mods which is fire. W game but lemon, I have something to tell you. Make a cosmetic that says either moderator trial mod or admin and give us every cosmetic! If not pls give me mod I beg of u. At least trial mod
I was playing a fan game and the owner of this game said he would give me and a couple other kids mod so we joined a code and waited for him but he didn't join and we don't have mod

developer_response.body: First off, we don't promote our game in other creator's games. We earn our player base, second thing that was most likely a little child trolling just trying to help the game get players.
